arts.sum: During the press conference, Klopp outlined his vision for overseeing Red Bull’s football operations while clarifying that he will not be managing any of the group’s teams. Jürgen Klopp was introduced as Red Bull’s new Head of Global Soccer on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk Named His Favourite Footballer of All Time
arts.sum: The Dutchman, a one-time Premier League winner, named a former Barcelona star as his favourite footballer of all time.

arts.ttl: Liverpool, Real Madrid, Bayern…Nottingham Forest: the shock feat eight clubs have in common
arts.sum: When the 2024/25 Premier League season started in August last year, few would have foreseen a January game between Nottingham Forest and Liverpool being billed as a top-of-the-table clash . The year after being promoted from the English third tier under legendary manager Brian Clough in 1977, Nottingham Forest won their first ever English Division One title (the name for the top league at the time), making them the most recent promoted team to achieve that feat in England.

arts.ttl: 'Let's see' - Jurgen Klopp drops new Man City 115 charges view as Liverpool plan emerges
arts.sum: A hearing examining more than 100 Premier League charges against Manchester City concluded last month

arts.ttl: From Brazil: Nottingham Forest reach ‘internal approval’ to sign midfielder
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest have reached the ‘internal approval’ stage to sign midfielder Richard Ríos from Brazilian club Palmeiras. That’s according to Premier League Brasil, who report that the midfielder has been ‘closely watched’ by Nottingham Forestt. They’ve now received ‘internal approval’ to sign him.
